Free Public Version - Auto Tool

Auto-fill Documents Automatically upload and fill standard forms.
Fast Navigation Auto-click 'Next' and bypass waiting screens.
Auto-Retry Payment Automatically try again if server fails.
Success Sound Alert Play a sound when payment is successful.
Automation Speed Adjust the speed of the bot to prevent blocks.
